sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75249" key="o)rniqopro/swpos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρνῑθο-πρόσωπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n75249.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bird-faced,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:3:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
